summary: Iteration 32 - Property Form Extended Fields Testing Complete. Backend fix applied (added missing extended fields to create_property endpoint). All 9 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified: 3-column layout, all form sections, price conversion, map interaction, validation, summary card.

backend.POST /api/properties with extended field: PASS - All new fields (salons, kitchens, toilets, floors, year_built, commune, landmarks, equipment, show_usd, show_eur, hide_email, show_phone, whatsapp_direct) saved correctly
backend.GET /api/properties/{id} returns extende: PASS - Extended fields returned in response
backend.New property types accepted: PASS - location_meublee, location_non_meublee, colocation, bail_commercial all work
backend.PUT /api/properties/{id} updates extende: PASS - All extended fields can be updated
backend.Price conversion in response: PASS - price_converted object with gnf, usd, eur values

frontend.Header with logo and nav links: PASS - Logo, 'Tableau de bord', 'Mes annonces' links present
frontend.Photos section with upload button: PASS - '+ Ajouter' button present, drag/drop hint shown
frontend.USD/EUR conversion checkboxes: PASS - Both checkboxes present, conversion shows '≈ 100 000 USD' and '≈ 92 473 EUR'
frontend.Rooms +/- buttons: PASS - 6 pairs of +/- buttons for chambres, salles de bain, salons, cuisines, toilettes, etages
frontend.Equipment checkboxes by category: PASS - 4 categories: Equipements exterieurs, Equipements interieurs, Securite, Confort/Options
frontend.Location section fields: PASS - Ville (Conakry default), Commune dropdown, quartier, points de repere, GPS fields
frontend.Leaflet map with orange marker: PASS - Map renders at Conakry position, marker visible
frontend.Map click updates GPS: PASS - Clicking map updates latitude/longitude fields
frontend.Summary card appears with title: PASS - Shows title, category, type, city, price when title filled
frontend.Action buttons: PASS - 'Publier l'annonce', 'Enregistrer en brouillon', 'Annuler' buttons present
frontend.Form validation errors: PASS - Shows errors for missing photos, surface, description, phone

critical_code_review_comments: Backend fix applied: Added missing extended fields (salons, kitchens, toilets, floors, year_built, commune, landmarks, equipment, show_usd, show_eur, hide_email, show_phone, whatsapp_direct) to create_property endpoint in routes/properties.py
Frontend PropertyFormPage.js is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
MapWithPin component correctly uses Leaflet with draggable orange marker
Price conversion uses fixed rates GNF_TO_USD=1/8600 and GNF_TO_EUR=1/9300 as documented
Equipment stored as array of string labels as expected
seed_data_creation: Test properties created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Property form extended fields fully tested and working. Backend fix applied to include all new fields in create_property. Routes at /immobilier/publier (create) and /immobilier/modifier/{id} (edit). Form requires login. All dropdowns have correct options including new property types (location_meublee, location_non_meublee, colocation, bail_commercial) and categories (immeuble, magasin). Map interaction works - clicking updates GPS coordinates.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are fully functional with real MongoDB storage
